description_long: This is a rectangular 1-liter juice carton with a vibrant blue and orange color scheme, branded as Faragello Mango Premium Nectar. The front and back panels feature large, realistic images of diced mango pieces with water droplets, evoking freshness and fruitiness. The brand name 'Faragello' is prominently displayed in white and red on a bold red banner, with the product name 'Mango Premium Nectar' below in white and blue. The side panels contain detailed nutritional information and product details in multiple languages, as well as a barcode and recycling symbols. The top of the carton is flat with a visible sealed area, but no cap or spout is apparent. The packaging is made of laminated paperboard, typical for juice cartons, and is designed to be lightweight and portable.
description: A 1-liter Faragello Mango Premium Nectar juice carton with vivid mango imagery, blue and orange colors, and detailed branding and nutritional panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Faragello brand, large diced mango images, and product name in English and French.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutritional information panel and recycling symbols.
description_view_2: Back view with similar branding and mango imagery as the front, but with the product name in English only.
description_view_3: Opposite side panel with multilingual product information and a barcode at the bottom.
